items.title: Players who sign a one-year contract, or a two-year contract with a player or team option on Year 2, and will have Bird or Early Bird rights, get an implied no-trade clause. Players can choose to waive this implied NTC upon signing their contract.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt: Players who sign a one-year contract, or a two-year contract with a player or team option on Year 2, and will have Bird or Early Bird rights, get an implied no-trade clause. Players can choose to waive this implied NTC upon signing their contract.

items.title: The Deandre Ayton trade further proves one of the least credited rules in the NBA: That every Lakers big man eventually has to play for the Wizards and vice versa.
items.author: Fred Katz
items.body_excerpt:
The Deandre Ayton trade further proves one of the least credited rules in the NBA: That every Lakers big man eventually has to play for the Wizards and vice versa. 

Ayton, AD, Dwight, Markieff Morris, Wagner, JaVale, Thomas Bryant — the cycle will never end.

items.title: Can confirm that Andre Drummond is coming to the Knicks, per league sources.
items.author: James L. Edwards III
items.body_excerpt:
Can confirm that Andre Drummond is coming to the Knicks, per league sources. 

The Big Penguin provides the size, veteran experience and rebounding (statistically one of the best ever) that the Knicks need and were looking for with Robinson gone.

Also, good locker room guy.
